name: LibreTranslate
description: Free and open-source machine translation API supporting 30+ languages — self-hostable or use public instance.
longDescription: LibreTranslate is a free, open-source machine translation API powered by Argos Translate. It supports translation between 30+ languages and detection of the source language. Unlike other translation APIs, LibreTranslate is fully open source under the AGPL license and can be self-hosted. The public API at libretranslate.com provides free translation with moderate rate limits; self-hosting has no limits.
pricing: Free public API with rate limits; self-hostable for unlimited use
affiliateText: Self-host LibreTranslate on Railway — Docker-based deploy in under 5 minutes.
